role.name: gateway
role.purpose: Owns the unified API entry point: routing, authentication middleware, rate limiting. Single front door for all external requests.

forbidden_actions: Reading or writing any path outside gateway/ and shared/
Implementing business logic that belongs in other domains
Logging or exposing sensitive data from request payloads
Bypassing authentication or rate limiting for convenience
escalation_triggers: Changes to authentication or authorization logic
Any routing change that could affect domain boundary enforcement
